headline: Is Globant’s (GLOB) Deeper Autodesk Tandem Role Quietly Reframing Its Physical AI Ambitions?
summary: Earlier in April 2026, Globant announced it had been named an Autodesk Tandem Digital Twin Solution Provider, expanding their 15-year collaboration to deliver implementation services, enterprise integrations, and operational data enablement for Autodesk’s cloud-based digital twin platform across airports, smart buildings, manufacturing facilities, and logistics environments worldwide. This move links Globant’s Digital Twins Practice with Autodesk Tandem to help organizations shift from...

headline: Autodesk vs Snowflake: Which Is the Better Short Candidate Right Now?
summary: Autodesk (NASDAQ: ADSK) and Snowflake (NYSE: SNOW) trade at nearly identical market caps near $50 billion, but the question for short-focused investors is which one carries more downside risk right now. The answer is Snowflake, and the data makes a compelling case. Valuation: Snowflake Has No Margin for Error Both stocks have pulled back sharply from their ... headline: Michael Burry buys the dip in Salesforce and other software stocks after AI-fueled sell-off
summary: "I do not believe the technical pressures brought on by the private credit/software debt issues are big enough to affect these stocks for much longer," he said.
